[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 4/8 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Yukari, 3★ Renge, 3★ Kikyou
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 4/8 (Tue) 2:00 – 4/15 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
